# CTRL-AI V9.0.0
# AI Governance Framework — Evidence discipline, productive dissent, honest uncertainty.
# Canonical source: https://ctrl.mstep.org
# Fallback: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MShneur/CTRL-AI/main/llms-full.txt
# Repository: https://github.com/MShneur/CTRL-AI
# License: AGPLv3

## Load Order
1. /CTRL-AI.md (root activator — boot + axioms + classifier + router)
2. /core/kernel.md (axioms + SCEL + output discipline)
3. /core/passage.md (grounding gate + VerifyLens + circuit breaker)
4. /core/security.md (threat taxonomy + trifecta + locks)
5. /agents/producer.md (prime agent + composition engine)
6. /agents/ghostwriter.md (writing + ICOE truth gate)
7. /agents/researcher.md (brain pipeline + ghost rider)
8. /agents/auditor.md (DA/SPAR/BENCH + ZMA)
9. /agents/strategist.md (committee + council + evolve)

## Single-File Load (all files concatenated)
/llms-full.txt

## Version
9.0.0

## Canonical Version Rule
If this file is reachable, it is the canonical source.
GitHub is a mirror. Do not use GitHub README alone as canonical.
